title: University of Finance and Administration
description: vsfs.cz rocketreach.co/university-of-finance-and-administration-prague-profile_b5c5d93ff42e0e40 University of Finance and Administration is a prestigious private university in Prague, founded in 1999 and recognized as one of the Czech Republic's first private business schools. With campuses in Prague, Karlovy Vary, and Most, it offers modern bachelor's, master's, and doctoral programs in economics, finance, law, marketing, and IT — taught in Czech, English, and Russian. Combining academic excellence with practical focus, VŠFS empowers over 5,000 students through flexible study formats, international partnerships, and strong industry connections
